title: Life web
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Life Web''' was a [[Force sense/Legends|sense]]-based [[Force power/Legends|Force power]] which allowed [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitives]] to sense the general direction and approximate distance of large concentrations of members of a specific alien species, such as [[Human/Legends|Humans]] or [[Rodian/Legends|Rodians]]. It could not detect populations of less than 100,000. A user would have to be familiar with the alien race in order to detect members of that species, and he or she could only sense one species at a time.

[[Dev Sibwarra]] learned this power from his mother [[Ydra Kilwallen Sibwarra]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-10-XX -->''[[Star Wars Gamemaster Screen, Revised]]''
*<!-- 1996-02-XX -->''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]''
*<!-- 1996-11-XX -->''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]''
